name: ANT, GIANT
statblock: AC 16, HP 18, ATK 1 bite +3 (2d6), MV double near, S +3, D +1, C +2, I -4, W +0, Ch -4, AL N, LV 4
description: Giant (6′ long), omnivorous, black ants. Rapaciously consume everything in their path. Known to mine veins of crystal beneath ley lines.

abilities.name: Relentless
abilities.description: Once engaged in melee, giant ants pursue relentlessly — even through flames. They do not break off combat voluntarily.

abilities.name: Hoard
abilities.description: 30% chance the colony has accumulated 1d10 × 100gp in gold nuggets or crystals mined by the ants.

name: BAT, GIANT
statblock: AC 13, HP 9, ATK 1 bite +1 (1d4), MV close; double near (fly), S -1, D +3, C +0, I -3, W +2, Ch -3, AL N, LV 2
description: Black-furred, carnivorous bats with a 4′ wingspan. May attack adventurers if hungry.

abilities.name: Echolocation
abilities.description: Navigates by sound. Unaffected by blindness or sight-impairing effects. Blinded by magical silence.

name: BAT, VAMPIRE
statblock: AC 13, HP 9, ATK 1 bite +1 (1d4 + unconsciousness), MV close; double near (fly), S -1, D +3, C +0, I -2, W +2, Ch -3, AL C, LV 2
description: Red-eyed bats with a 5′ wingspan and crooked fangs, bred by the Nag-Lord. Roost in the twisted woods around its demesne.

abilities.name: Echolocation
abilities.description: Navigates by sound. Unaffected by blindness or sight-impairing effects. Blinded by magical silence.

abilities.name: Unconsciousness
abilities.description: On a hit, the victim makes a DC 12 CON check or falls unconscious for 1d10 rounds.

abilities.name: Blood Drain
abilities.description: A vampire bat attached to an unconscious victim drains 1d4 HP automatically each round. A victim killed this way makes a DC 12 CON check or rises as a ghoul after 24 hours.

name: BEAR
statblock: AC 13, HP 18, ATK 2 claws +3 (1d3) and 1 bite +3 (1d6), MV near, S +4, D +0, C +3, I -3, W +1, Ch -2, AL N, LV 4
description: 6′ tall, gentle-natured, brown-furred bears that shamble around snuffling for berries and roots. Adults protect their young with their lives, but otherwise only attack if cornered.

abilities.name: Bear Hug
abilities.description: If both claw attacks hit the same target in one round, the bear automatically deals 2d8 additional damage as it crushes them.

name: BOAR
statblock: AC 12, HP 13, ATK 1 tusk +2 (2d4), MV double near, S +2, D +1, C +2, I -4, W -1, Ch -4, AL N, LV 3
description: Omnivorous wild boars that dwell throughout Dolmenwood. Irascible and dangerous if disturbed.

name: BURROWING BEETLE, GIANT
statblock: AC 15, HP 9, ATK 1 bite +1 (2d4) or 1 oil spray +1, MV near; near (burrow), S +1, D +0, C +1, I -4, W -1, Ch -4, AL N, LV 2
description: 3′ long beetles with great horns and mandibles used for burrowing. Subsist on fungi, roots, and carrion. Non-aggressive unless provoked.

abilities.name: Oil Spray
abilities.description: Three times per day. Range near. On hit, the target suffers painful blistering: -2 to attack rolls for 24 hours.

name: CARRION WORM
statblock: AC 12, HP 13, ATK 2 tentacles +2 (paralysis), MV near, S +2, D -1, C +2, I -3, W +1, Ch -3, AL N, LV 3
description: Rapacious, 9′ long, corpse-white worms covered in sticky slime, with a ring of writhing tentacles around their lamprey-like mouths.

abilities.name: Paralysis
abilities.description: On a tentacle hit, the victim makes a DC 12 CON check or is paralyzed for 2d4 rounds (aware but unable to move or act). The worm devours paralyzed victims if left in peace.

abilities.name: Cling
abilities.description: Can climb vertical surfaces and ceilings.

name: CATFISH, GIANT
statblock: AC 15, HP 36, ATK 1 bite +7 (2d8) and 4 barbels +7 (1d4), MV near (swim), S +4, D +1, C +3, I -3, W +1, Ch -3, AL N, LV 8
description: 15′ long, pale white catfish with four spiked barbels. Spawn in Lake Longmere but sometimes venture into other waters. Attack swimming creatures.

abilities.name: Mutations
abilities.description: Many are tainted by the Nag-Lord's influence in Longmere — unicorn-like horns, multiple eyes, and writhing tentacles are common.

name: CAVE SALAMANDER
statblock: AC 14, HP 13, ATK 1 bite +2 (1d8), MV near, S +2, D +2, C +1, I -3, W +0, Ch -3, AL N, LV 3
description: 5′ long, carnivorous, subterranean amphibians that occasionally emerge aboveground at night. Dark blue skin with orange spots. Aggressive but easily spooked.

abilities.name: Cling
abilities.description: Climbs walls and ceilings freely and may drop onto victims from above for surprise attacks.

name: CENTIPEDE, GIANT
statblock: AC 10, HP 2, ATK 1 bite +0 (1 + poison), MV close, S -2, D +2, C -1, I -4, W +0, Ch -4, AL N, LV 1
description: 1′ long centipedes lurking in rotting trees, caverns, and other dark, damp locations. Aggressive and carnivorous.

abilities.name: Poison
abilities.description: On hit, DC 12 CON or become sick for 1d10 days: -2 to attacks and checks, movement halved.

name: CRAB, GIANT
statblock: AC 17, HP 13, ATK 2 pincers +2 (2d6), MV close; near (swim), S +3, D -1, C +2, I -4, W -1, Ch -4, AL N, LV 3
description: Rapacious, 4′ tall crustaceans birthed in the weird waters of Lake Longmere. Lurk in the shallows and creep along beaches. Ravenously attack any moving creature.

name: EARTHWORM, GIANT
statblock: AC 13, HP 31, ATK 1 bite +6 (1d4 + swallow), MV close; close (burrow), S +4, D -2, C +3, I -4, W -1, Ch -4, AL N, LV 7
description: Gigantic (30′ long), greyish-pink worms with gaping, toothless maws. Burrow deep in the earth beneath Dolmenwood, devouring anything in their path.

abilities.name: Swallow
abilities.description: On a natural 19-20 bite attack roll, a near-sized or smaller target is swallowed. The swallowed creature takes 1d8 damage per round and may attack the worm at -4. If the swallowed creature dies, they are fully digested after 1 hour.

name: FALSE UNICORN
statblock: AC 12, HP 9, ATK 1 horn +1 (1d4), MV far, S +0, D +3, C +0, I -3, W +1, Ch +0, AL N, LV 2
description: White-furred deer with a single horn, easily mistaken for a unicorn from a distance. Timid and skittish, with a highly distinctive flatulent stench at close range.

abilities.name: Stench
abilities.description: Within close range, the creature's distinctive flatulence is unmistakable — DC 9 CON or -1 to attacks while adjacent.

name: FIRE BEETLE, GIANT
statblock: AC 15, HP 4, ATK 1 bite +0 (1d4), MV near, S +0, D +0, C +1, I -4, W -1, Ch -4, AL N, LV 1
description: 2-3′ long beetles with a trio of glowing glands on their iridescent carapace. They browse on fungi and mosses in gloomy glades, peaceful unless defending their nest.

abilities.name: Glowing Nodules
abilities.description: The beetle sheds light in a close radius. Removed nodules continue to glow for 1d6 days.

name: FLY, GIANT
statblock: AC 13, HP 13, ATK 1 bite +2 (1d8), MV near; double near (fly), S +0, D +3, C +1, I -3, W +1, Ch -3, AL N, LV 3
description: 3′ long bluebottles that subsist on carrion and offal. May attack bloodied characters. Make an infuriating droning buzz in flight.

abilities.name: Leap
abilities.description: After attacking, can leap up to near range away from the victim as a free action.

name: FROG, GIANT
statblock: AC 12, HP 9, ATK 1 talon +1 (1d2) and 1 bite +1 (1d4), MV close; near (swim), S +1, D +2, C +0, I -4, W -1, Ch -4, AL N, LV 2
description: 2′ long, mutant frogs with vicious talons and teeth. Highly aggressive and voraciously carnivorous — even eating their own kind. Dwell underground and in the forlorn swamps of Dolmenwood.

name: GELATINOUS APE
statblock: AC 11, HP 9, ATK 1 thrown branch +1 (1d4), MV double near, S +0, D +2, C +0, I +0, W +1, Ch +2, AL L, LV 2
description: Hairless, brightly coloured, transparent apes (3′ tall) with jelly-like flesh. Gentle-natured and show great kindness to lost travellers. Their flesh is sweet and chewy.

name: GOBBLE
statblock: AC 13, HP 2, ATK 1 bite +0 (1d3), MV near, S -2, D +2, C -1, I -3, W +1, Ch +2, AL N, LV 1
description: Fluffy, purple, arboreal primates about the size of a baby, with huge, adorable eyes. Sleep in high branches during the day, creep down to forage for grubs at night.

abilities.name: Babble
abilities.description: Each gobble knows a single word of Woldish, which it babbles incessantly when encountered.

name: GRIFFON
statblock: AC 14, HP 31, ATK 2 claws +6 (1d4) and 1 bite +6 (2d8), MV near; far (fly), S +4, D +2, C +2, I -2, W +1, Ch -1, AL N, LV 7
description: Large, rapacious predators with the body of a lion and the head, wings, and claws of an eagle. Prey on horses and those who ride them.

abilities.name: Horse Hatred
abilities.description: Instinctively attacks any horse in sight. Even when trained, commanding it not to attack a horse requires a DC 15 WIS check.

abilities.name: Tameable
abilities.description: If raised from a hatchling, griffons can be trained as fiercely loyal mounts.

name: HAWK
statblock: AC 11, HP 2, ATK 1 talon +0 (1d2), MV far (fly), S -2, D +3, C -1, I -3, W +2, Ch +0, AL N, LV 1
description: Small birds of prey, sometimes trained as guards or hunting animals. Only attack humanoids if they appear defenceless.

abilities.name: Swoop
abilities.description: If the target is unaware of the hawk, the first attack deals double damage.

name: HAWK, GIANT
statblock: AC 15, HP 27, ATK 2 talons +5 (1d4+1) and 1 bite +5 (2d6), MV close; far (fly), S +3, D +3, C +2, I -3, W +2, Ch -1, AL N, LV 6
description: Gigantic, 12′ wingspan birds of prey that nest in great trees and isolated hills. Prey on humans and other sentients, carrying smaller victims aloft.

abilities.name: Swoop
abilities.description: If the target is unaware, the first attack deals double damage. On an attack roll of 18+, a near-sized or smaller target can be carried away.

name: HEADHOG
statblock: AC 12, HP 2, ATK 1 bite +0 (1d2), MV near, S -2, D +1, C -1, I -3, W +1, Ch -2, AL N, LV 1
description: Black-spined, flea-ridden hedgehogs with long, pink tongues. Creep out of the undergrowth to sleep on the heads of campers, infesting them with fleas, before fleeing when discovered.

abilities.name: Flea Infestation
abilities.description: A creature that wakes with a headhog on their head makes DC 9 CON or is infested with fleas: -1 to all checks until treated (1 hour with fire or herbs).

name: HONEY BADGER
statblock: AC 11, HP 4, ATK 2 claws +0 (1d3) and 1 bite +0 (1d3), MV near, S +0, D +1, C +1, I -3, W +0, Ch -2, AL N, LV 1
description: Squat, white-furred badgers slick with a honey-like substance oozing from their pores. Nocturnal omnivores known for their curiosity and ravenous hunger.

name: INSECT SWARM
statblock: AC 12, HP 13, ATK 1 swarm (auto 2, or 4 unarmored), MV near; near (fly), S -4, D +2, C +0, I -4, W -1, Ch -4, AL N, LV 3
description: Seething swarms of many tiny bugs filling a near-sized area. May be encountered protecting their nest or drawn to light or unusual smells.

abilities.name: Swarm Attack
abilities.description: Automatically deals 2 damage per round to all creatures in the swarm area (4 to unarmored creatures). Creatures who brandish weapons take only half damage.

abilities.name: Fire and Smoke
abilities.description: Only harmed by fire or magical cold. Smoke disperses the swarm immediately.

abilities.name: Clinging Insects
abilities.description: On leaving the swarm area, creatures continue taking 1 damage per round for 3 rounds from clinging insects.

name: KILLER BEE
statblock: AC 12, HP 2, ATK 1 sting +0 (1d3 + poison), MV double near (fly), S -3, D +3, C -1, I -4, W +0, Ch -4, AL N, LV 1
description: Giant (1′ long) bees of aggressive temperament. Build hives underground or in cliffs. Usually attack on sight; always attack intruders within near of their hive.

abilities.name: Sacrifice
abilities.description: After a successful sting, the bee dies. Its stinger remains lodged in the victim, dealing 1 damage per round until removed (takes an action).

abilities.name: Poison
abilities.description: On sting hit, DC 12 CON or die in 1d4 rounds.

abilities.name: Magical Honey
abilities.description: A hive has a 50% chance of containing 2d3 pints of magical honey; each pint heals 1d4 HP when consumed.

name: LEECH, GIANT
statblock: AC 12, HP 27, ATK 1 bite +5 (1d6 + blood drain), MV near; near (swim), S +3, D +0, C +3, I -4, W -1, Ch -4, AL N, LV 6
description: Ancient leeches, 3-4′ long, that have drained the blood of hundreds of animals, growing ever fatter and more voracious as they age.

abilities.name: Blood Drain
abilities.description: On a hit, the leech attaches and automatically deals 1d6 damage at the start of each round. The leech can only be removed if killed.

name: LURKEY
statblock: AC 12, HP 4, ATK 1 bite +0 (1d2), MV near, S -1, D +2, C +0, I -2, W +1, Ch -1, AL N, LV 1
description: Ungainly ground birds with stiff black feathers, egg-yolk orange beaks, and outrageous wobbly pink wattles. Easy prey when cornered, but cunning at evading pursuit.

abilities.name: Scatter
abilities.description: When threatened, each lurkey flees in a different direction, making it nearly impossible to pursue the whole group at once.

name: MERRIMAN
statblock: AC 13, HP 4, ATK 1 tusk +0 (1d4), MV near, S -1, D +2, C +0, I -3, W +0, Ch +1, AL N, LV 1
description: Miniature, golden swine with curly tusks and long, twisty tails. Scuttle through bracken snuffling up mushrooms and moss. When bedding down, families sing haunting, surprisingly human-like songs.

name: MOSS MOLE
statblock: AC 10, HP 2, ATK 1 bite +0 (1d2), MV close; close (burrow), S -2, D +0, C -1, I -3, W +1, Ch -1, AL N, LV 1
description: Surface-dwelling moles as large as cats, with mottled green-brown fur and yellowish paws. Placid and easily startled, letting out a girlish shriek when disturbed.

name: OOZE SALAMANDER
statblock: AC 15, HP 27, ATK 2 bites +5 (1d8), MV close, S +4, D -1, C +3, I -4, W -2, Ch -4, AL N, LV 6
description: Gigantic (12′ long), two-headed salamanders with near-transparent flesh — their sluggish internal organs visible in torchlight. They leave trails of sticky ooze through their underground hunting grounds.

abilities.name: Ambush
abilities.description: When motionless in darkness, targets must make DC 15 WIS or be surprised.

name: OWLBEAR
statblock: AC 14, HP 22, ATK 2 claws +4 (1d8) and 1 bite +4 (1d8), MV near, S +4, D +0, C +3, I -3, W +0, Ch -3, AL N, LV 5
description: 8′ tall, ill-tempered, carnivorous bear-like creatures with the face of an owl. Nest in caves and hollow trees.

abilities.name: Bear Hug
abilities.description: If both claw attacks hit the same target in one round, the owlbear automatically deals 2d8 additional damage.

name: PIKE, GIANT
statblock: AC 15, HP 18, ATK 1 bite +3 (4d4), MV far (swim), S +3, D +3, C +2, I -3, W +1, Ch -3, AL N, LV 4
description: Predatory fish 9-14′ long. Attack anything nearby when hungry. Spawn in the deeps of the Groaning Loch.

name: PUGGLE
statblock: AC 13, HP 4, ATK 1 bite +0 (1d4), MV double near, S -1, D +2, C +0, I -2, W +1, Ch +1, AL N, LV 1
description: Little, silver-furred, flat-faced dogs with bulging eyes and lolling tongues. Live in vivacious communities, burrowing tunnels into sandbanks and gargantuan mushrooms.

name: PURPLE WORM
statblock: AC 13, HP 67, ATK 1 bite +9 (2d8 + swallow) and 1 sting +9 (1d8 + poison), MV close; close (burrow), S +6, D -2, C +5, I -4, W -2, Ch -5, AL N, LV 15
description: Gigantic (100′ long, 8-10′ thick) slimy worms with a voracious maw and a poison tail stinger. Bore tunnels through the earth and surface to indiscriminately devour living creatures.

abilities.name: Swallow
abilities.description: On a natural 18-20 bite attack roll, a near-sized or smaller target is swallowed. The swallowed creature takes 3d6 damage per round and may attack the worm at -4. If the swallowed creature dies, they are digested after 1 hour.

abilities.name: Poison
abilities.description: On a sting hit, DC 18 CON or die.

name: RAPACIOUS BEETLE, GIANT
statblock: AC 16, HP 13, ATK 1 bite +2 (2d6), MV double near, S +2, D +2, C +1, I -3, W +0, Ch -3, AL N, LV 3
description: Carnivorous, 4′ long, striped beetles with powerful crushing mandibles. Hunt other giant insects but sometimes attack humanoids and livestock.

name: RAT, GIANT
statblock: AC 12, HP 2, ATK 1 bite +0 (1d3 + disease), MV near; near (swim), S -1, D +2, C -1, I -3, W +0, Ch -3, AL N, LV 1
description: 3′ long, disease-ridden rodents with black or grey fur. Eat anything. Make burrows beneath ruins, burial mounds, and graveyards.

abilities.name: Disease
abilities.description: 1-in-20 giant rats carry disease. On a bite hit, DC 12 CON or become sick for 1d10 days: movement halved and take 1d3 damage each day.

name: RED DEER
statblock: AC 12, HP 13, ATK 1 antlers +2 (1d6) or 1 stampede +2 (1d20), MV far, S +1, D +3, C +1, I -3, W +2, Ch -1, AL N, LV 3
description: Elegant, red-furred deer with dappled flanks. Wander Dolmenwood browsing on moss and ferns. Timid and skittish.

abilities.name: Stampede
abilities.description: Herds of 20 or more can trample Small and Medium creatures in their path. 3-in-4 chance each round.

abilities.name: Females
abilities.description: Three-quarters of the herd are females with no antlers; they use the stampede attack only.

name: SHAGGY MAMMOTH
statblock: AC 16, HP 54, ATK 2 tusks +8 (2d6) or 1 trample +8 (4d8), MV near, S +6, D -1, C +4, I -3, W +1, Ch -1, AL N, LV 12
description: Shaggy, green-furred mammoths with spiralling tusks. Roam at twilight foraging for night-fruits. Peaceful but catastrophically dangerous if enraged.

abilities.name: Trample
abilities.description: In place of tusk attacks, the mammoth tramples: 3-in-4 chance each round of hitting all near-sized or smaller creatures in its path.

abilities.name: Ivory
abilities.description: Each tusk is worth 2d4 × 100gp if harvested.

name: SLUG, GIANT
statblock: AC 11, HP 54, ATK 1 bite +8 (1d12) or 1 acid spit (far) +8 (4d6), MV close, S +5, D -2, C +4, I -4, W -1, Ch -5, AL N, LV 12
description: Gargantuan (30′ long) grey slugs with rasp-like tongues and acidic spit. Voracious predators that dwell underground, occasionally surfacing to hunt.

abilities.name: Blunt Immunity
abilities.description: Unharmed by non-magical blunt weapons.

abilities.name: Acid Spit
abilities.description: Range far, one target. DC 15 DEX or take 4d6 acid damage; success halves damage.

name: SNAKE-ADDER
statblock: AC 13, HP 4, ATK 1 bite +0 (1d3 + poison), MV near, S -2, D +2, C +0, I -4, W +1, Ch -3, AL N, LV 1
description: 4′ long snakes with grey/green scales lurking in undergrowth throughout Dolmenwood. Only attack if surprised or cornered.

abilities.name: Poison
abilities.description: On hit, DC 12 CON or take 1 damage at the start of each round for 1d6 rounds.

name: SNAKE-GIANT PYTHON
statblock: AC 13, HP 22, ATK 1 bite +4 (1d4 + constrict), MV near, S +4, D +1, C +3, I -4, W +0, Ch -3, AL N, LV 5
description: 20′ long snakes with spiralling brown and yellow patterns. Emerge from unknown crevices during the unseason Chame. Their coils squeeze with bone-crushing force.

abilities.name: Constrict
abilities.description: On a bite hit, the python wraps around the target. DC 12 STR or be constricted, taking 2d4 automatic damage at the start of each round until the python is killed.

name: SPINNING SPIDER, GIANT
statblock: AC 13, HP 13, ATK 1 bite +2 (1d6 + poison) or 1 web +2 (entangle), MV close; near (climb), S +2, D +2, C +1, I -2, W +0, Ch -3, AL C, LV 3
description: 6′ long black spiders with a dull but wicked cunning. Fill the wild places of Dolmenwood with their pernicious webs.

abilities.name: Poison
abilities.description: On bite hit, DC 12 CON or die in 1 round.

abilities.name: Web
abilities.description: On hit, DC 12 DEX or become entangled: -2 to attacks and checks, cannot move. DC 12 STR (action) to break free. Burning webs deal 1d6 damage to all within.

name: STIRGE
statblock: AC 12, HP 4, ATK 1 beak +0 (1d3 + blood drain), MV close; double near (fly), S -2, D +3, C +0, I -3, W +1, Ch -3, AL N, LV 1
description: Feathered, bird-like creatures with long, sharp beaks. Bred by the Nag-Lord and released in swarms across Dolmenwood.

abilities.name: Dive Attack
abilities.description: +2 to attack rolls on the first round of combat.

abilities.name: Blood Drain
abilities.description: On a successful hit the stirge latches on, draining 1d3 HP automatically each round. Attacks against a latched stirge suffer −4; a natural 1 hits the victim instead.

abilities.name: Won't Let Go
abilities.description: A latched stirge only releases when its victim is dead.

name: SWAMP SLOTH
statblock: AC 10, HP 4, ATK 1 claw +0 (1d3), MV close, S -1, D -1, C +0, I -3, W +1, Ch -2, AL N, LV 1
description: Infant-sized mammals that creep through the treetops of boggy regions gathering fruits. Fur appears green from profuse moss and lichen growth. Attack only in defence.

name: SWAMP SPIDER, GIANT
statblock: AC 15, HP 22, ATK 1 bite +4 (2d6 + poison), MV near; near (climb), S +3, D +2, C +2, I -3, W +0, Ch -3, AL N, LV 5
description: Mottled brown-grey spiders with small orb-like bodies on spindly 8′ multi-jointed legs. Their venom-dripping jaws sit below a cluster of beady eyes.

abilities.name: Poison
abilities.description: On hit, DC 15 CON or take 1d6 damage per round for 5 rounds.

name: TOAD, GIANT
statblock: AC 12, HP 9, ATK 1 tongue +1 (grab) or 1 bite +1 (1d4), MV near, S +2, D +0, C +1, I -4, W -1, Ch -3, AL N, LV 2
description: Warty amphibians grown to the size of a great hound by bathing in ley-infused pools. Prone to attack any creature that comes within range of their long, sticky tongue.

abilities.name: Sticky Tongue
abilities.description: Range near. On a tongue hit, a near-sized or smaller target is dragged adjacent and immediately bitten (1d4 damage). DC 12 STR to resist being dragged.

abilities.name: Camouflage
abilities.description: In forests or dim light, targets must succeed on a DC 12 WIS check to spot the toad before it attacks.

name: TROTTELING
statblock: AC 12, HP 4, ATK 1 tusk +0 (1d4), MV near, S -1, D +1, C +0, I -2, W +0, Ch -1, AL N, LV 1
description: Naked, miniature pigs with pinkish-brown skin and the faces of petulant toddlers. Rummage through undergrowth for carrion, bickering constantly. Delectable when roasted.

name: WATER TERMITE, GIANT
statblock: AC 13, HP 9, ATK 1 bite +1 (1d4) or 1 irritant spray +1, MV near; near (swim), S +0, D +1, C +0, I -3, W +0, Ch -3, AL N, LV 2
description: Giant (2-3′ long), wood-eating, aquatic insects which latch onto the underside of passing boats and gobble the wood. Only attack creatures if cornered.

abilities.name: Irritant Spray
abilities.description: Once per turn: target one creature within near range above the water. DC 12 DEX or suffer −2 to attacks and checks for 1 turn.

abilities.name: Eat Ships
abilities.description: Clings to the hull of vessels; each termite inflicts 1 damage per round before dropping off. Crew has a 50% chance per round of noticing leaks.

name: WEASEL, GIANT
statblock: AC 12, HP 18, ATK 1 bite +3 (2d4), MV double near, S +2, D +3, C +1, I -2, W +2, Ch -2, AL N, LV 4
description: 8-9′ long, vicious, predatory mammals with rich fur of brown, gold, or white. Dwell in subterranean tunnels wherever giant rats are found.

abilities.name: Relentless Pursuit
abilities.description: Relentlessly follows wounded prey by scent, never losing the trail.

name: WOAD
statblock: AC 11, HP 4, ATK 1 bite +0 (1d4) or 1 urine spray +0, MV near, S -1, D +1, C +0, I -4, W +0, Ch -3, AL N, LV 1
description: Great, warty toads as big as a cat, yellowish-white with tongues of shocking scarlet. Only attack if cornered. Their flesh is edible but care must be taken not to burst the bladder.

abilities.name: Urine Spray
abilities.description: Range near. On hit, DC 12 CON or be unable to act for 1 round. The stench lingers until washed off — creatures coming within close of the soaked victim make DC 9 CON or suffer -1 to attacks for 1 round.

name: WOLF
statblock: AC 12, HP 9, ATK 1 bite +1 (1d6), MV double near, S +2, D +2, C +1, I -3, W +2, Ch -2, AL N, LV 2
description: Dwell in wild woods and caves. Usually hunt game animals. Only attack sentients when extremely hungry.

abilities.name: Pack Hunter
abilities.description: Packs of 6 or more wolves gain +2 to morale. Wolves flanking a target gain +1 to attacks.

name: WOLF, DIRE
statblock: AC 13, HP 18, ATK 1 bite +3 (2d4), MV double near, S +3, D +2, C +2, I -2, W +1, Ch -2, AL C, LV 4
description: Large, savage, semi-intelligent wolves attracted to the evil of the Nagwood. Relish devouring sentients. Extremely difficult to train even from cubhood.

abilities.name: Bloodlust
abilities.description: Once a dire wolf wounds a target, it gains +2 to all subsequent attack rolls against that same target.

name: YEGRIL
statblock: AC 11, HP 18, ATK 2 hooves +3 (1d6), MV near, S +2, D +1, C +2, I -3, W +2, Ch +0, AL N, LV 4
description: Gigantic, fluffy moose with luxuriant purple fur, moon-yellow eyes, and sensitive five-toed paws. Gentle creatures that mewl plaintively and flee if attacked.
